title: Installer warning repair proof loop
acceptanceCriteria: setup, doctor, verify, repair, and install remain mutually coherent on the current machine.
Legitimate environment constraints remain visible and are not downgraded into false greens.
The reproduced pnpm test red is resolved with a minimal scoped fix.
No unnecessary production-code changes are made if the remaining issue is only test isolation.
The proof bundle contains the baseline evidence, classification, fix evidence, and a fresh verifier pass.
